# Saint Elias Antiochian Orthodox Church

> Saint Elias is an Antiochian Orthodox Christian parish in Arvada, Colorado, serving the Denver metro area. We celebrate the Divine Liturgy every Sunday at 10:00 AM and welcome visitors, inquirers, and those exploring the Orthodox Christian faith. Services are offered in English and Arabic.

Location: 7580 Pierce Street, Arvada, CO 80003. Everyone is welcome — no membership or prior experience is needed to attend.

## Visiting & Worship
- [Plan Your Visit](https://steliasarvada.com/visit): What to expect at your first Divine Liturgy, parking, and where to sit.
- [Services & Schedule](https://steliasarvada.com/services): Weekly and feast-day service times, Holy Week, and the liturgical calendar.
- [Watch Live & Sermons](https://steliasarvada.com/watch): Livestreamed services and recorded homilies.
- [Contact & Directions](https://steliasarvada.com/contact): Address, map, phone, and email.

## About the Parish
- [About Our Parish](https://steliasarvada.com/about): History, clergy, and the Antiochian Orthodox tradition.
- [Becoming Orthodox](https://steliasarvada.com/new-members): For inquirers and catechumens exploring the Orthodox Christian faith.
- [Ministries](https://steliasarvada.com/ministries): Parish ministries and fellowship groups.
- [Sunday School](https://steliasarvada.com/sunday-school): Christian education for children and youth.

## Get Involved
- [Events & Fundraisers](https://steliasarvada.com/events): Upcoming parish events and gatherings.
- [Mediterranean Festival](https://steliasarvada.com/festival): Our annual community festival with food, music, and dance.
- [Volunteer & Serve](https://steliasarvada.com/volunteers): Ways to serve the parish and community.
- [Give](https://steliasarvada.com/give): Support the parish through offerings and donations.

## Optional
- [Weekly Bulletin](https://steliasarvada.com/bulletin): The current parish bulletin.
- [Privacy Policy](https://steliasarvada.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Use](https://steliasarvada.com/terms)
